programme.title: FishON | Spring Break on Mattagami Lake
programme.desc: Season 8 Episode 3 kicks off our first open-water shoot of the year as Paul Ethier and Jeff Shippam make their way to the legendary Mattagami Lake for some classic spring walleye action. With competitive tournaments on pause this season, the guys revisit their favourite early-season hotspots—areas they’d normally fish under pressure—now with time to explore, adapt, and enjoy the day. From structure-hopping to dialing in the spring pattern, Paul and Jeff put their tournament instincts to work for a fun, relaxed day chasing hungry post-spawn walleye in Northern Ontario.

This episode highlights the thrill of angling in Northern Ontario's untouched wilderness.

programme.title: All Stars
programme.desc: In the season finale of All Stars 3, the contestants’ hard work throughout the competition is put to the ultimate test. With tensions in the Middle East reaching a boiling point, the CIA assigns the All-Stars an executive protection mission for a key negotiator. However, before the team can deploy, escalating terrorist activity dramatically raises the threat level. Facing a surge of hostile forces, the All-Stars must come together to secure their principal and ensure their safety at all costs. When they're caught on the X with no clear way out, there's only one option left—eliminate the threat. Who will survive the mission? And who will emerge victorious?

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: Laura is back with Will Harris and family on their legendary farm. This week, we take a step further to unraveling the philosophies that make Will one of the true innovators of our time. Laura also gets to see how the “Poorest town in America” has been impacted for the better due to Whit Oak Pastures and their commitment to the community they serve. Later, Laura and Will get gussied up to attend a gala that recognizes Will for his dedication.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: This episode kicks off inside the headquarters of Law Enforcement Specialists, where their mission is clear: Prevent. Protect. Respond. From their signed officer wall to their welcoming space for first responders, Bonnie and her team are on the front lines for those who serve. We also get an inside look at their groundbreaking Blue Dispatch software, helping departments streamline jobs and response times. Next, the A-Team travels to Naples, Florida, to celebrate the grand opening of David Beavis’ newest gallery, where his breathtaking photography delivers a powerful message of God’s love and the beauty of creation. Then, Eric Couch of Provision Brokerage shows how his company protects seniors’ “safe money” and builds retirement security for the long haul. Finally, we visit the Connected & Protected call center with president Adam Marsh, where their team makes it simple for seniors to stay safe with innovative, easy-to-use technology.

programme.title: Boom America
programme.desc: The episode opens with Michael Bellemare of Switch It Up Inc., who shares how a simple bar-napkin sketch grew into a million-dollar operation specializing in turnkey solar, LED lighting, and EV charging. With a passion for revitalizing the trades, Michael stresses the importance of training programs and investing in people as he maps out his goal of scaling to a $100M company—and even explores franchising with Kevin. Next, teacher-turned-inventor Sean Worthington introduces Raida Tech, where a bathtub question—“What is money?”—led to a new form of data-supremacy currency and safer, uncensored AI. Sean looks to the A-Team for marketing, sales, and customer acquisition support. Then, Dale Krueger of Tangible Assets LLC explains how his coin-collecting hobby evolved into an investment platform blending art and assets, now ready to scale beyond word-of-mouth investors. Finally, Richard Simon of New Home National Title showcases his on-call title insurance service and seeks guidance on breaking into TV advertising to reach homebuyers nationwide.

programme.title: Journey Through Corsica
programme.desc: Journey Through Corsica – Full Length Film (4K) | NatureStream.tv Embark on a breathtaking aerial and sea-level journey across the wild west coast of Corsica — where red granite cliffs plunge into turquoise coves, and the Mediterranean meets raw island wilderness. This preview trailer features spectacular drone cinematography and boat-based footage filmed around the Scandola Nature Reserve, Girolata Bay, and the rugged coastlines near Piana and Porto — some of the most dramatic seascapes in Europe. 🕊️ A NatureStream.tv Original — cinematic nature films designed for relaxation, focus, and pure visual immersion.

programme.title: Slo Mo Snow
programme.desc: Experience the wondrous snow storms that blanketed California's Sierra Mountains in January of 2023 in NatureStream.tv's newest release: "Slo Mo Snow". Available to subscribers of NatureStream.tv

Then experience some of the best riders from around the globe as they conquer massive mountains, perform jaw-dropping tricks, and push the limits of skill and adrenaline in breathtaking terrain.

programme.title: S1E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. From rescuing lions at the Kevin Richardson Wildlife Sanctuary in South Africa to safeguarding orangutans and Cape Griffons in the wilds of Indonesia, witness heart-pounding rescues, fierce battles against exploitation, and inspiring stories of survival. This is conservation at its most daring—unmissable, unforgettable, and truly wild.

programme.title: S1E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Join “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson and a fearless team of conservationists on an epic mission to protect the planet’s most majestic and endangered predators. programme.title: S2E1 Adventure Series
programme.desc: From polar bears to roaring lions—this is GoPro Adventures at its wildest. Dive into jaw-dropping encounters with lions, whales, turtles, giraffes, and watch “The Lion Whisperer” Kevin Richardson at his South African sanctuary, where rescued predators find a second chance. It’s the ultimate fusion of wildlife wonder and high-octane thrills—you won’t be able to look away.

programme.title: S2E2 Adventure Series
programme.desc: Motorbikes, speed, and pure adrenaline—this is the ultimate GoPro adventure. Ride with Mexican enduro master Didier Goirand, push limits alongside British racing icon Maria Costello, the only female motorcycle racer ever to be awarded an MBE, and feel the thrill with American motorsports legend and DC Shoes founder Ken Block. High-octane action, world-class talent, and breathtaking moments—you won’t want to miss a second.
